title: Help me with this huge unanswered question (including from Google)
excerpt: Hi, I would like to know if there is certification for Monday.com? I didn’t find it anywhere, not even on Google! How do I become a partner and access certification, if any?

posts.author: vilchesthiago (Thiago Vilches)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I would like to know if there is certification for Monday.com? I didn’t find it anywhere, not even on Google! How do I become a partner and access certification, if any?
